name: Counter-Strike 2
description: Counter-Strike 2 dedicated server template using the ADPanel SteamCMD installer. It installs app 730, persists the server in /home/container and starts the server with safe structured startup variables.

install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
app_id="${SRCDS_APPID:-730}"
steam_user="${STEAM_USER:-anonymous}"
steam_pass="${STEAM_PASS:-}"
steam_auth="${STEAM_AUTH:-}"
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps
install_steamcmd() {
  rm -f /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz
  curl --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 -fsSL -o /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
  tar -xzf /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
}
if [ ! -x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh ] || [ ! -x /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd ]; then
  rm -rf /mnt/server/steamcmd
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  install_steamcmd
fi
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
login_args=(+login "$steam_user")
if [ "$steam_user" != "anonymous" ]; then
  login_args=(+login "$steam_user" "$steam_pass")
  [ -z "$steam_auth" ] || login_args+=("$steam_auth")
fi
for attempt in 1 2 3 4; do
  if HOME=/mnt/server ./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server "${login_args[@]}" +app_update "$app_id" ${EXTRA_FLAGS:-} validate +quit; then
    break
  fi
  status=$?
  if [ "$attempt" -eq 4 ]; then
    exit "$status"
  fi
  rm -rf /mnt/server/steamcmd/package /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd
  install_steamcmd
  sleep $((attempt * 15))
done
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so || true
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so || true
if [ ! -x /mnt/server/game/bin/linuxsteamrt64/cs2 ]; then
  echo "CS2 executable missing after SteamCMD install."
  exit 30
fi
chmod -R a+rwX /mnt/server
echo "Installation completed."
